records.question: Which artist exactly named Triumfall, aged 49, released the famous title Antithesis of All Flesh on June 15, 2009?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
WHERE artist.famous_title = 'Antithesis of All Flesh' AND artist.famous_release_date = 'June 15, 2009' AND artist.artist = 'Triumfall' AND artist.age = 49
records.pred_sql: SELECT Artist_ID FROM artist WHERE Artist = 'Triumfall' AND Age = 49 AND Famous_Title = 'Antithesis of All Flesh' AND Famous_Release_date = 'June 15, 2009'

records.question: Which artists named Gorgoroth, aged 34, with the famous title Bergen 1996, had a volume issue 45:16 released on 24 January that stayed at most one week on top?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT artist.artist_id FROM artist
JOIN volume ON artist.artist_id = volume.artist_id
WHERE artist.famous_title = 'Bergen 1996' AND volume.volume_issue = '45:16' AND artist.artist = 'Gorgoroth' AND volume.weeks_on_top <= 1.0 AND volume.issue_date = '24 January' AND artist.age = 34
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Artist_ID FROM artist AS T1 INNER JOIN volume AS T2 ON T1.Artist_ID = T2.Artist_ID WHERE T1.Artist = 'Gorgoroth' AND T1.Age = 34 AND T1.Famous_Title = 'Bergen 1996' AND T2.Volume_Issue = '45:16' AND T2.Issue_Date = '24 January' AND T2.Weeks_on_Top <= 1

WHERE artist.age <= 18 AND volume.weeks_on_top <= 1.0 AND artist.artist = 'Black Flame' AND artist.famous_title = 'Imperivm' AND volume.volume_issue = '46:9' AND volume.issue_date = '6 June' AND artist.famous_release_date = 'June 23, 2008'
